_docs.description: Site-wide announcement banner configuration. The banner plugin polls this file and applies changes without restart.
_docs.enabled: boolean - true to show the banner, false to hide it
_docs.severity: string - visual style of the banner. Possible values: 'info' (blue #006699), 'warning' (yellow #e6a800 with black text), 'critical' (red #dc0018)
_docs.dismissible: boolean - true lets users close the banner with an X button. Dismissed state is remembered per message in localStorage.
_docs.messages: object - one key per language code (de, fr, it, en). Each value is the banner text shown to users in that language.

messages.de:
In der Woche vom 16. März 2026 wird LINDAS im Rahmen des Projekts LindasNext migriert.
Dabei erfolgt der Wechsel der Datenbank von Stardog auf GraphDB. Während der Migration kann es zu kurzfristigen Unterbrüchen in der Verfügbarkeit kommen. Bei Problemen können sie sich an den Service Desk wenden: https://servicedesk.lindas.admin.ch/
messages.fr:
Au cours de la semaine du 16 mars 2026, LINDAS sera migré dans le cadre du projet LindasNext.
La base de données passera alors de Stardog à GraphDB. Pendant la migration, il peut y avoir des interruptions de disponibilité de courte durée. En cas de problème, vous pouvez contacter le service desk: https://servicedesk.lindas.admin.ch/
messages.it:
Nella settimana del 16 marzo 2026, LINDAS verrà migrato nell’ambito del progetto LindasNext.
Ciò comporterà il passaggio dal database Stardog a GraphDB. Durante la migrazione potrebbero verificarsi brevi interruzioni della disponibilità. In caso di problemi, è possibile contattare il Service Desk: https://servicedesk.lindas.admin.ch/
messages.en:
During the week of March 16, 2026, LINDAS will be migrated as part of the LindasNext project.
This will involve switching the database from Stardog to GraphDB. There may be brief interruptions in availability during the migration. If you encounter any problems, please contact the Service Desk: https://servicedesk.lindas.admin.ch/
